name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the GAME backend, scoring engine, or DSL
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Which area?**
<!-- scoring engine / strategy DSL / REST API / wallets & economy / auth / dashboard / docs / other -->

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. "When integrating GAME I cannot [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen, ideally from an API consumer's or strategy author's point of view.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
